tools.name: read_url_list
tools.description: Read property URLs from a text file, one per line. Lines starting with # are comments and are ignored. Requires: path.

tools.name: fetch_page
tools.description: Fetch a property listing page and extract structured data: page title, Open Graph meta tags, JSON-LD blocks, and price/status text snippets. Requires: url.

tools.name: read_state
tools.description: Read the stored property state JSON from disk. Returns {} if the file does not exist. Requires: path.

tools.name: write_state
tools.description: Persist updated property state JSON to disk. Requires: path (output file), content (compact JSON string).
